message:
fix: resolve DOM nesting violations (#10376) (#10382) - AlertListItem: move role="button" to inner info area so action buttons (snooze, acknowledge, diagnose) are no longer nested inside an interactive region — fixes button-inside-button accessibility violation - SubmitTab: change

wrapper to

around token links since
